acceptance_criteria: Zero-spend preflight verifies secret-safe ADC and service readiness before any model call.
The selected CodeClash provider config can run without leaking credentials.
If preflight fails, no paid model call is made and blocked evidence is published.
No leaderboard, SWE-bench, production, or live-domain result is claimed.

evidence.notes: ADC token refresh failed before any provider call; command output suppressed token values.
Review confirms the blocked result does not claim provider capability or benchmark performance.
No production or live-domain behavior changed.

falsifiers: The paid smoke must not run if ADC cannot refresh without interactive reauthentication.
The result must be blocked if any credential value would need to be printed or committed.
The result must not claim provider-model capability because no model call occurred.
The result must not claim leaderboard, SWE-bench, production, or live-domain verification.
stated_goal: Run the selected Vertex Gemini CodeClash provider-model pilot smoke under a $25 ceiling, or publish blocked/null evidence if zero-spend preflight fails.
